title: Education and Training Materials - Canada.ca
content:
## Education and Training Materials

## Standard for Pesticide Education, Training and Certification in Canada
The Standard for Pesticide Education, Training and Certification in Canada is a series of documents which outline the structure and criteria for provincial/territorial pesticide applicator and vendor/dispenser certification programs. These documents were developed through extensive discussions and represent a consensus between the provincial/territorial/federal representatives who participated in their development.

### Applicator Basic Knowledge Requirements
- Aquatic Vegetation Module
- Industrial Vegetation Module
- Mosquito and Other Biting Flies Module

### Vendor/Dispenser Basic Knowledge Requirements
- Vendor/Dispenser Core
- Vendor/Dispenser Module for Commercial and Restricted Pesticides
